root:
Usage: finetuning <command> [options]
Defaults are offline: deterministic generation and local-pseudo translation require no API keys.

Commands:
  simulate-dataset   v1           Generate a synthetic OpenAI-format JSONL dataset from a scenario config.
  validate-dataset   v1           Validate JSONL rows and print a dataset summary.
  generate-personas  v1           Generate reusable synthetic personas for a scenario.
  translate-dataset  experimental Translate dataset content while preserving schema-bearing fields.
  convert-logs       deferred     Deferred: no log-derived dataset converter is implemented in v1.

Bundled scenario profiles:
  sample-receptionist      healthcare   Demo Clinic receptionist
  sample-retail-support    retail       Atlas Outdoor retail support

Run finetuning <command> --help for command options.

Noun-oriented local commands:
  dataset freeze       Freeze canonical JSONL into an immutable dataset directory.
  embed data create|import|convert|validate|inspect|split|dedupe|freeze|export
                        Process canonical/ST/HF embedding data without model recipe claims.
  embed generate queries|documents|pairs | embed mine negatives
  embed distill vectors|scores|rankings|plan|run|resume|status
                        Run train-only embedding distillation workflows.
  pipeline status      Read local stage-attempt status without mutation.
  pipeline resume      Resume a declarative local constant-stage plan.
  distill init|plan|responses|resume|status|freeze
                        Run a compliant local response-distillation pipeline.
  template inspect|render|audit
                        Inspect late-bound template metadata and audit status.
  training prepare|run|resume|status|evaluate|export
                        Prepare and execute versioned local training runs.
generate-personas:
Usage: finetuning generate-personas (--profile <id> | --config <path>) --out <path> [--count <n>] [--provider-config <path>] [--persona-provider deterministic|openai|anthropic] [--persona-model <model>] [--persona-api-key-env <ENV_NAME>] [--force]
Default: --persona-provider deterministic, no API key required.
Provider-backed personas require --persona-provider, a model, and an API key env var.
Config: --provider-config can provide providers.persona; CLI flags override config values.
simulate-dataset:
Usage: finetuning simulate-dataset (--profile <id> | --config <path>) --out <path> [--limit <n>] [--mode <mode>] [--provider-config <path>] [--simulation-provider deterministic|openai|anthropic] [--simulation-model <model>] [--simulation-api-key-env <ENV_NAME>] [--force]
Modes: plain_chat, tool_decision, full_tool_trajectory
Default: --simulation-provider deterministic, no API key required.
Provider-backed simulation requires --simulation-provider, a model, and an API key env var.
Config: --provider-config can provide providers.simulation; CLI flags override config values.
translate-dataset:
Usage: finetuning translate-dataset <path> --target-locale <bcp47> --out <path> [--source-locale <bcp47>] [--provider-config <path>] [--strategy local-pseudo|openai|anthropic] [--translation-model <model>] [--translation-api-key-env <ENV_NAME>] [--force]
Status: experimental.
Default: --strategy local-pseudo, no API key required.
Provider-backed translation requires --strategy openai|anthropic, a model, and an API key env var.
Default env vars: OPENAI_API_KEY for openai, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for anthropic.
Config: --provider-config can provide providers.translation; CLI flags override config values.
convert-logs:
Usage: finetuning convert-logs
Status: deferred; no v1 log-derived dataset converter is implemented.
Reason: Real-log conversion is excluded from v1 until the package has a public log source contract, redaction hooks, privacy guidance, and redacted fixture coverage.
Required before release:
  - accepted public log record shape
  - assistant content extraction rules
  - assistant tool-call extraction rules
  - tool result extraction rules
  - caller-supplied redaction hooks for messages, tool arguments, tool results, and metadata
  - privacy-safe redacted fixture set with validation coverage
  - provider/runtime-independent converter implementation
